title: polypodiodes niponica
intro: Polypodiodes niponica, also known as Japanese polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodiodes niponica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce blood sugar levels, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or infusion, or it is made into a powder and used as a supplement.
